title: stelis zothecula
intro: Stelis zothecula, also known as the Orchid Stelis, is a rare and unique type of flowering orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis zothecula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis zothecula often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for wound healing and skin conditions.
